And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 463, 1440, 850], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1:3 And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 854, 1440, 1061], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1:4 And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1065, 1440, 1362], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1:5 And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1366, 1440, 1663], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1:6 And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1667, 1440, 1964], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "1:7 And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.", "resource-id": "android:id/text1", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1968, 1440, 2224], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "", "resource-id": "com.gyc.ace.kjv:id/btnpre", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "bounds": [0, 2224, 480, 2392], "componentLabel": "Image"}, {"text": "Locate", "resource-id": "com.gyc.ace.kjv:id/btnlocate", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "bounds": [480, 2224, 960, 2392], "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"text": "", "resource-id": "com.gyc.ace.kjv:id/btnnext", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.widget.Button", "bounds": [960, 2224, 1440, 2392], "componentLabel": "Image"}]}
